video.title: Smart Gym Bugs Are Still Here
video.description:
This is Part 2 from the full Speediance/Fitness Tech workout discussion. I dig into the FitHub Titan and FitHub Titan Max marketing, the resistance claims, the bench and rower add-ons, and why the product page and ads make it hard to know what you are actually buying.

I also walk through Speediance dynamic weight modes, custom workouts, RM settings, handle connection issues, and the UX decisions that make the smart-gym experience more complicated than it needs to be.

Full episode: https://youtu.be/GzqAzoSKBWQ

Not training advice. This is personal experience and commentary based on the products, software, and marketing available to me at the time of recording.

Chapters:
00:00 FitHub Titan caught my attention  
01:30 Confusing model names and ads  
03:08 Resistance claims, rower, and bench details  
05:41 Why dynamic weight modes matter  
07:30 Tonal-style arm positioning and UX gaps  
10:30 Recommended workouts vs custom workouts  
12:00 RM settings and mode configuration  
13:30 Handle connection issues  
15:00 Why the modes need more control  
16:30 Bugs after the update 

#FitHubTitan #Speediance #SmartHomeGym
